rationale: No events with direct relevance to Portugal this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty continues as background noise affecting energy prices indirectly.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: A confirmed deal could lower European gas prices, offering modest relief to Portuguese households. Still unresolved — no change from prior cycle.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Middle East escalation could disrupt energy markets and Atlantic shipping routes marginally, but impact on Portugal remains very indirect.

top_events.title: Deadly Philippines earthquake raises seabed by up to 2 metres
top_events.summary: Major natural disaster in Southeast Asia — no meaningful connection to Portugal's economy or daily life.
